---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the commit/diff/browse workflow is broken or wrong
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened
<!-- What went wrong? A screenshot or short screen recording helps a lot for a visual tool. -->

## Steps to reproduce
1. <!-- Which repo did you point Kyde at? (size / language can matter) -->
2. <!-- What did you click / type? -->
3. <!-- What did you expect, and what happened instead? -->

## Environment
- Kyde version: <!-- About / the release you downloaded, or the commit you built -->
- OS + version: <!-- e.g. macOS 15.4, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 -->
- Installed from: <!-- release artifact / built from source -->

## Logs / panic output
<!-- If it crashed, paste any output from the terminal (run via `cargo run` or the `ky`
command to capture it). A panic backtrace is gold. -->
